reviews.review_title: Good game but I want a refund
reviews.review_description: So overall I like the game but I dont know what to do and It can get boring over time and thats what happened so I got bored with it and wanted to refund it but I couldn't even know it's saying I can in the refund policy so all I'm saying is if you get this game make sure to read the reviews first and same with the refund policy

I really do enjoy this game, there is a lot to do and a lot to learn. However, while doing the tutorial, even though I was scanning the items as requested, it got stuck and kept telling me to scan. Also, there are so many codes and various things that you have to do, it can get a bit convoluted. While I appreciate a good game with a great learning curve, I think some of the controls can be made a bit simpler, more intuitive & user-friendly. When there is so much to learn it's hard to fully get into the game and immerse yourself in it. Just my suggestion! I will be happy to give an updated review when things are patched.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your valuable feedback and for enjoying Astro Chef! We're sorry to hear about the trouble you had during the tutorial. Could you let us know which part got you stuck? We want to make sure everything runs smoothly for our chefs in training. 🚀

Your suggestions about simplifying controls and making the game more intuitive are greatly appreciated. We're all about creating an immersive, enjoyable experience, so we'll definitely take your feedback into consideration for future updates.

Looking forward to your updated review after our update(s) and thanks again for helping us improve. Happy cooking! 🌌👨‍🍳

reviews.review_description: If you want to feel like The Bear in space this is the game to get. It looks great and has so much variety it keeps me coming back for more. It offers a different challenge in the VR world and has a nice combination of good fun and problem solving which is very engaging.

This a fantastic game, lots of fun to play and also very pleasant looking with plenty of wacky characters and ingredients to choose from. 
After completing the tutorial it was easy to pick up but challenging enough to make it an enjoyable experience. Hours of fun!

developer_response.body:
We're absolutely delighted to hear you're enjoying Astro Chef! 🌟 Thanks so much for your fantastic feedback. It's awesome to know the mix of wacky characters, diverse ingredients, and the balance between ease of learning and challenge is hitting the right notes for you.

Hearing that you've had hours of fun and found the experience both pleasant and engaging is exactly what we aim for. Your enjoyment is our biggest reward! Keep diving into those culinary adventures, and who knows what new wacky dishes you'll cook up next. 🚀👩‍🚀
Thank you for being a part of our Astro Chef family, and happy cooking! 🌌👨‍🍳

reviews.review_description:
b i t , l y / a s t r o c h e f v r

More complex than I first thought and graphics are very nice! Looking forward to playing through this one seems like it will take me many hours :)

developer_response.body:
Hi Seth,
We are  thrilled to hear you're enjoying Astro Chef! Thanks for the feedback, and happy gaming! 🚀👨‍🍳

reviews.review_description: Really enjoyed playing the game. Me and bf mostly did co op only issue is we were having trouble with the blender. It does not look like it is loading on the timer like in the promo video and we couldn't seem to figure out why with the manual.

developer_response.body:
Hey there! Thanks a ton for playing Astro Chef and for your great feedback. We're so glad you've enjoyed the co-op mode! 🚀

We noticed the issue with the blender and have already released a hotfix update (version 1.0.4) that should fix it. Please update your game to the latest version to see the improvements.

Happy cooking and thanks again! 👨‍🍳

reviews.review_title: This deserves to be on that main store
reviews.review_description: I am a fan of any simulator game  that is bizarre, this cooking sim is not simple like most other cooking sims.
I love it it’s fun and great playing with a friend, the detail, the fun; we both love it! Keep up the good work!
